name: Inno Setup
description: Free installer for Windows programs by Jordan Russell — script-driven with a mature, stable UI.

seo.title: Inno Setup — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Inno Setup: Free installer for Windows programs by Jordan Russell — script-driven with a mature, stable UI.

when_to_use: Script-driven Windows installer creation for desktop apps
Custom install UI with registry and file operations
Silent installation mode for enterprise MSI-free deploys
Digitally sign Windows installers in automated pipelines

pros: Battle-tested Windows installer used by thousands of apps
Mature Pascal scripting with deep customization
cons: Pascal scripting is niche and off-putting
No MSIX output, only classic EXE installers
UI feels very Windows-98 by default
Single maintainer project, slow release cadence
review.verdict: The safe, boring, works-forever Windows installer — unbeatable if you don't need MSIX.
review.best_for: Shipping classic Win32 desktop apps with a traditional installer wizard.
review.not_for: Teams that need MSIX, Store submission, or modern cross-platform tooling.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
